message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor black
  LifeLineBorderColor black
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor white
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorBackgroundColor white
  BoxBorderColor black
  BoxBackgroundColor white
  NoteBorderColor black
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
}

actor user
participant "Gstreamer Pipeline" as pipeline
participant "librealsense2" as rs2
participant "GStreamer" as gst

note left of user
load GST
pipeline with
realsensesrc
end note

user -> pipeline : realsensesrc\nserial=728...
activate pipeline

== pipeline goto GST_STATE_READY ==

pipeline -> pipeline : create
create participant realsensesrc as src
activate src

src -> rs2 : rs2::context.query_devices()
activate rs2
rs2 --> src : rs2::device_list
deactivate rs2

src -> rs2 : select device by serial
activate rs2
rs2 --> src : rs2::sensor
deactivate rs2

note right of rs2 : Select device

loop for (info: rs2::rs2_camera_info)\nrs2::device.supports(info)
  src -> rs2 : rs2::device.supports(info)
  activate rs2
  rs2 --> src : bool
  deactivate rs2

  src -> rs2 : rs2::device.get_info(info)
  activate rs2
  rs2 --> src : const char* info_string
  deactivate rs2

  src -> src : store info
end

src -> gst : gst_tag_setter_add_tag_valist_values(...,infos, NULL)
activate gst
gst --> src
deactivate gst

note right of gst
Register per-stream
metadata as
Gst tags
end note

src -> rs2 : rs2::sensor.get_stream_profiles()
activate rs2
rs2 --> src : std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>
deactivate rs2

loop for (profile: std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>)\nCreate profile_list of supported profiles
  src -> src : Create
end

src -> gst : g_object_class_install_properties(...,...,options)
activate gst
gst --> src
deactivate gst

note right of gst
Install all
supported
video profiles
as an option
end note

loop for (option: rs2::rs2_option)\nrs2::sensor.supports(option)
  src -> rs2 : rs2::sensor.supports(option)
  activate rs2
  rs2 --> src : bool
  deactivate rs2

  src -> rs2 : rs2::sensor.get_option_range
  activate rs2
  rs2 --> src : rs2::option_range
  deactivate rs2

  src -> src : store option
end

src -> gst : g_object_class_install_properties(...,...,options)
activate gst
gst --> src
deactivate gst

note right of gst
Install all
supported
RS camera options
as properties/options
end note

src -> gst : gst_bus_add_watch(bus, bus_call...)
activate gst
gst --> src
deactivate gst

note right of gst : Register callback\nfor parameter changes

pipeline -> src : caps negotiation\n(CAPS)
note right of src
- pixel_format
- width
- height
- framerate
end note

== pipeline goto GST_STATE_PLAYING ==

pipeline ..> src : state=playing
src -> rs2 : rs2::sensor.start()
activate rs2
rs2 --> src
deactivate rs2

== pipeline goto GST_STATE_READY ==

src -> rs2 : rs2::sensor.stop()
activate rs2
rs2 --> src
deactivate rs2

deactivate src
deactivate pipeline
@enduml
